facts.statement: The Sahara Desert covers 5 million km²
facts.actual: About 9,200,000 km², roughly the size of the United States
Spans 11 countries (Algeria, Chad, Egypt, Libya, Mali, Mauritania, Morocco, Niger, Sudan, Tunisia, and SADR)

facts.statement: The average high temperature in the Sahara is 50°C in the hottest months
The Sahara has a population of 10 million people
facts.actual: About 2,500,000 people live in the Sahara

facts.statement: The Sahara stretches 2,000 km from east to west
facts.actual: Approximately 4,800 km from the Atlantic Ocean to the Red Sea
